title: Korak 6

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def merge_sort(array):
    middle_point = len(array) // 2
    left_part = array[:middle_point]
    right_part = array[middle_point:]
    
    merge_sort(left_part)
challengeFiles.seed:
def merge_sort(array):
    middle_point = len(array) // 2
    left_part = array[:middle_point]
    right_part = array[middle_point:]
    
    merge_sort(left_part)

tests.text: You should call merge_sort() with the argument right_part at the bottom of your function body.

description: Na dnu tela vaše funkcije, ponovo pozovite funkciju merge_sort(). Ovog puta, prosledite right_part kao argument poziva funkcije.
